title: Sparse Matrix Representation and Conversion
description: A visual comparison of a standard 2D array representation and the more efficient triplet list representation of a sparse matrix, highlighting the storage savings.
elements: Standard 2D Array (6x6) with mostly zero values
Application Examples: Linear Systems, Graph Adjacency, Image Processing
relationships: Standard representation is converted to a triplet list for efficient storage
The triplet list is used by applications that leverage matrix sparsity for performance gains
